name: reconstruction_wisdm_raw_v1
purpose: Evaluate the repository's raw phone-accelerometer WISDM adapter under the manuscript's stated HD protocol, using the user-specified single seed 42.

data.representation: raw three-axis sensor readings; no window transformation
data.provenance: Official UCI 507 distribution plus REPO_EXISTING adapter behavior. The manuscript identifies the modality and split but does not specify a raw-versus-window transformation.

limitations: This is a single-seed reconstruction screening run, not a paper reproduction or a paper-result estimate.
The manuscript does not specify the raw-versus-windowed WISDM representation; this profile uses the existing raw-row adapter.
The original data snapshot, seed protocol, aggregation rule, and source results are unavailable.
